metadata.summary: Add a property that is an alias for an indexer to a class.

documentation:
========
keyalias
========

Visit the website `https://keyalias.johannes-programming.online <https://keyalias.johannes-programming.online>`_ for more information.

documentation: Get a keyalias decorator for a class.
